summary_en: 70 yen/share period-end dividend (50 yen ordinary + 20 yen 60th-anniversary commemorative). Full-year dividend 120 yen/share (50 yen interim + 70 yen period-end). Dividend policy targets DOE 3.0%+ under medium-term plan.
title_en: Notice Regarding Dividend of Surplus (60th Anniversary Commemorative Dividend)
translation_en_brief:
Powdertech announced a revision to its FY2026 period-end dividend forecast on 15 May 2026. The company will pay 70 yen per share as the period-end dividend (record date 31 March 2026), comprising 50 yen in ordinary dividend and 20 yen in 60th-anniversary commemorative dividend. Combined with the interim dividend of 50 yen per share already paid, the full fiscal-year dividend will reach 120 yen per share.

The revision reflects the company's dividend policy to provide stable and continuous profit returns to shareholders while targeting a dividend-on-equity (DOE) of 3.0% or higher under the medium-term plan. The 60th-anniversary commemorative dividend was added as a token of gratitude to shareholders for their ongoing support during this milestone year.
